TH_YOUMU-STRIKE.title: Strike
TH_YOUMU-DEFEND.title: Defend
TH_YOUMU-AHEAD_SLASH.title: Step-in Slash
TH_YOUMU-ATTACK_WITH_DEFEND.title: Attack and Defend as One
TH_YOUMU-ATTACK_WITH_DEFEND.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-DEFEND_IN_ATTACK.title: Defense within Offense
TH_YOUMU-DEFEND_IN_ATTACK.description: Whenever you deal damage with an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GAS_BLADE_SLASH.title: Sword Gas Blade Slash
TH_YOUMU-GAS_BLADE_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
When [gold]Derived[/gold], if your [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] is less than 3, set this card's cost to 0 the first time it is played this turn. Otherwise, [gold]consume[/gold] 3 [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] and add a [gold]Sword Gas Blade Great Spin[/gold] to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-GAS_BLADE_GREAT_SPIN.title: Sword Gas Blade Great Spin
TH_YOUMU-GAS_BLADE_GREAT_SPIN.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
[gold]Sharpen Blade[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-RISE_UP_SLASH.title: Rising Slash
TH_YOUMU-RISE_UP_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Make the enemy lose [gold]Strength[/gold] equal to the damage dealt this turn.
TH_YOUMU-STEP_BACK.title: Backstep
TH_YOUMU-KESA_GIRI.title: Kesa Giri
TH_YOUMU-KESA_GIRI.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
For each living enemy, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-JUMP_SLASH.title: Jumping Slash
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_STAB.title: Blade Stab
TH_YOUMU-FORESIGHT.title: Foresight Slash
TH_YOUMU-FORESIGHT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy intends to attack, [gold]Sharpen Blade[/gold].
Consume all [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
[gold]Attack Derive[/gold] 1.
This card can only be played if you have [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GAS_BLADE_THRUST.title: Sword Gas Blade Thrust
TH_YOUMU-GAS_BLADE_THRUST.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
Shuffle a [gold]Sword Gas Helm Breaker{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[gold]Attack Derive[/gold] 1.
TH_YOUMU-HORIZONTAL_SLASH.title: Sword Gas Helm Breaker
TH_YOUMU-HORIZONTAL_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Consume 1 level of [gold]Blade[/gold].
When [gold]Derived[/gold], if you have [gold]Blade[/gold], double this card's damage once for each level.
TH_YOUMU-BOND_OF_ATTACHMENT.title: Bond of Attachment
TH_YOUMU-BOND_OF_ATTACHMENT.description:
Apply {Power:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_YOUMU-PRESENT_SLASH.title: Human Sign「Present World Slash」
TH_YOUMU-PRESENT_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Draw 1 card.
[purple]Spell Card Level Cancel[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-LIFE_DEATH_SLASH.title: Life and Death Slash
TH_YOUMU-LIFE_DEATH_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Attack Derive[/gold] 1.
When [gold]Derived[/gold], increase the damage of all cards with the same name by {Cards:diff()}. 
[red]Super Move Level Cancel[/red].
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-MEDITATION_SLASH.title: Life-Cutting Sword「Meditation Slash」
TH_YOUMU-MEDITATION_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain 1 [gold]Stiffness[/gold]; this card's [gold]Stiffness[/gold] counts as [purple]Spell Card Level[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-COMPASSIONATE_SLASH.title: Sword of Compassion「Compassionate Slash」
TH_YOUMU-COMPASSIONATE_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Gain 4 [gold]Stiffness[/gold]; this card's [gold]Stiffness[/gold] counts as [purple]Spell Card Level[/purple].
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all your [purple]Curses[/purple] and [red]Status[/red] cards; reduce this card's [gold]Stiffness[/gold] by 1 for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SMALL_SOUL.title: Soul Sign「Wheel of Suffering」
TH_YOUMU-SMALL_SOUL.description:
All [gold]Attack[/gold] cards you play this turn are played an additional time.
Reset [gold]Combo[/gold] stacks.
[purple]Spell Card Level Cancel[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-BIG_SOUL.title: Soul Sign「Dharma of Bright and Dark」
TH_YOUMU-BIG_SOUL.description:
For {Cards:diff()} turns, all cards you play are played an additional time.
Reset [gold]Combo[/gold] stacks.
[purple]Spell Card Level Cancel[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_FLASH.title: Sword Art「Sakura Flash」
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_FLASH.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Sakura[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], then gain that many [gold]Intangible[/gold].
When [gold]Derived[/gold], shuffle {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sakura[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
[purple]Spell Card Level Cancel[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-FUTURE_ALWAYS_SLASH.title: Human Ghost「Future Neverending Slash」
TH_YOUMU-FUTURE_ALWAYS_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies once for each [gold]Attack[/gold] card in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Regardless of where it is, at the start of your turn, play this card automatically against a random enemy.
[purple]Spell Card Level Cancel[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-MIND_RETURN.title: Human Wisdom Sword「Celestial Maiden's Return」
TH_YOUMU-MIND_RETURN.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
Choose a card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and put it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-MIND_RETURN.selectionScreenProm: Choose a card to put on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_SWORD.title: Sakura Sword「Sparkling Petals」
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies once for each card in your hand, plus an additional hit, and shuffle a [gold]Sakura{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Discard all cards in your hand (except [gold]Sword Art「Sakura Flash」[/gold]).
TH_YOUMU-CUT_BEWILDERED_SWORD.title: Confusion-Cutting Sword
TH_YOUMU-CUT_BEWILDERED_SWORD.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-BLOOD_SWORD_SLASH.title: Sword Art「Blood Blade」
TH_YOUMU-BLOOD_SWORD_SLASH.description:
Lose 2 HP.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies.
TH_YOUMU-AWAKE_SHOW_DARK.title: Human World Sword「Enlightenment of Light and Dark」
TH_YOUMU-AWAKE_SHOW_DARK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reduce the cost of all cards in your hand by 1 for {IfUpgraded:show:this combat|this turn} and give them [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-TRUTH_ETERNAL.title: Human God Sword「Ultimate Truth」
TH_YOUMU-TRUTH_ETERNAL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Upgrade[/gold] all cards in your hand; if a card is already [gold]Upgraded[/gold], reduce its cost by 1 for this combat.
Regardless of where it is, at the start of your turn, return this card to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-CUT_DREAM_SWORD.title: Ideal-Cutting Sword「Grass, Tree, Buddha Slash」
TH_YOUMU-CUT_DREAM_SWORD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all non-[gold]Attack[/gold] cards in your hand; increase this card's damage by {Cards:diff()} for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SKY_FORM.title: Heavenly Form
TH_YOUMU-SKY_FORM.description:
Your [gold]Cancel[/gold] now ignores [gold]Cancel Level[/gold] and always succeeds, but if the [gold]Canceled[/gold] card's [gold]Cancel Level[/gold] is not lower than the one canceling it, put it on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
Whenever you [gold]Cancel[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to the cost of the [gold]Canceled[/gold] card and reset [gold]Combo[/gold] stacks.
TH_YOUMU-LOSE_MY_MEAT.title: Forsake My Flesh
TH_YOUMU-LOSE_MY_MEAT.description:
Lose 10 HP.
Add a [gold]Sever Thy Bones{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-SLASH_YOUR_BONE.title: Sever Thy Bones
TH_YOUMU-SLASH_YOUR_BONE.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Buffer[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Increase this card's damage by {Cards:diff()} for each HP you have lost this combat.
After playing, this card returns to your hand. If the damage dealt is less than the enemy's attack intent value, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] this card.{InCombat:
 (Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} extra damage)|}
TH_YOUMU-KILL_MASTER_SWORD.title: Master-Killing Demon Sword
TH_YOUMU-HOLD_BLOOD_SWORD.title: Obsession Sword「Blood of Ashura」
TH_YOUMU-HOLD_BLOOD_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage; heal HP equal to damage dealt.
Add an [gold]Obsession[/gold] to your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-REBORN_SWORD.title: Reincarnation Sword「Cyclic Slash」
TH_YOUMU-REBORN_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} times.
[purple]Spell Card Level Cancel[/purple].
Shuffle your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SIX_ELEMENT_CLEAN.title: Empty Vision Sword「Six Roots Purification Slash」
TH_YOUMU-SIX_ELEMENT_CLEAN.description:
You cannot lose HP this turn.
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
At the start of your turn, if this card is in your hand, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
TH_YOUMU-MOON_SLASH.title: Crescent Moon Slash
TH_YOUMU-MOON_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage; if the enemy intends to attack, multiply damage by {Cards:diff()}.
[red]Super Move Level Cancel[/red].
Gain {Power:diff()} [gold]Stiffness[/gold]; this card's [gold]Stiffness[/gold] counts as [red]Super Move Level[/red].
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-EYE_SWORD.title: Piercing Eye Sword
TH_YOUMU-EYE_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-ZERO_SEVEN_TWO_ONE.title: Phosphorus Sword Slash
TH_YOUMU-ZERO_SEVEN_TWO_ONE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} times.
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
[red]Super Move Level Cancel[/red].
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-SUBDUE_WITHOUT_INTERVAL.title: Subdue Without Pause
TH_YOUMU-SUBDUE_WITHOUT_INTERVAL.descrip:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
For {Cards:diff()} turns, your [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] is not removed at the end of your turn.
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-AWAKE_INTO_DREAM.title: Human Realm Sword「Awakening into Illusion」
TH_YOUMU-AWAKE_INTO_DREAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Set the cost of a card in your hand to 0 the first time it is played this turn and give it [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_ETHERAL_GARDEN.title: Half-Phantom Gardener
TH_YOUMU-HALF_ETHERAL_GARDEN.description:
Cards with [gold]Ethereal[/gold] can be played for free.
When you play a card, if it does not have [gold]Ethereal[/gold], give it [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_GARDEN.title: Phantom Gardener
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_GARDEN.description: Whenever you play a card with [gold]Ethereal[/gold], [gold]Derive[/gold] 1 of its type, and give the [gold]Derived[/gold] card [gold]Ethereal[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_SWORD_GOD.title: Mysterious Sword Saint
TH_YOUMU-A_FLASH_TWO_MONTH.title: Hell Realm Sword「Two Hundred Yojana Flash」
TH_YOUMU-A_FLASH_TWO_MONTH.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card(s); if you have played fewer than 3 cards this turn, draw 1 additional card.
When [gold]Derived[/gold], trigger the played effect once.
TH_YOUMU-CURRENT_HOLD.title: Ashura Sword「Present World Obsession」
TH_YOUMU-CURRENT_HOLD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Choose up to one card from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and return it to your hand{IfUpgraded:show:, and it costs 0 the first time played this turn|}.
TH_YOUMU-CURRENT_HOLD.selectionScreenPro: Choose a card to return to hand.
TH_YOUMU-SHOT_BIRD_EVENT.title: Hiroari Shoots a Strange Bird
TH_YOUMU-SHOT_BIRD_EVENT.description: At the start of your turn, all players gain a random [gold]Attack[/gold] card; it can be played for free this turn.
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_HALF.title: Half-Human Half-Phantom Half-Wit
TH_YOUMU-HALF_HALF_HALF.description: Whenever you [gold]Derive[/gold], automatically play the [gold]Derived[/gold] card once, then shuffle a [gold]Clumsy[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-KIRISUTE_GOMEN.title: Kirisute Gomen
TH_YOUMU-KIRISUTE_GOMEN.description: Whenever you lose HP, multiply the damage you deal in this combat by 1.
TH_YOUMU-SEIZE_RETURN.title: Seize and Return
TH_YOUMU-SEIZE_RETURN.description: After triggering [gold]Counter[/gold], return the card to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-LEARN_NO_STOP.title: Unceasing Training
TH_YOUMU-LEARN_NO_STOP.description:
Randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} random card(s) in your [gold]deck[/gold].
While this card is in your hand, it must be played first.
Each time you play it, permanently increase its value by 1.
TH_YOUMU-REFLECT_SLASH.title: Reflecting Lower World Slash
TH_YOUMU-REFLECT_SLASH.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Deal damage equal to the enemy's intent value to it.
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-HEAD_FLOWER_SLASH.title: Top of Head Flower-Cutting Slash
TH_YOUMU-HEAD_FLOWER_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Gain [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] equal to damage dealt.
[red]Super Move Level Cancel[/red].
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-GREEN_GAS_SLASH.title: Cross-Legged Slash
TH_YOUMU-GREEN_GAS_SLASH.description:
Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[red]Super Move Level Cancel[/red].
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-HEART_SLASH.title: Heart-Copy Slash
TH_YOUMU-HEART_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Draw until you draw a non-[gold]Attack[/gold] card; increase this card's damage by {Cards:diff()} for each card drawn.
[red]Super Move Level Cancel[/red].
This card can be [gold]Upgraded[/gold] multiple times.
TH_YOUMU-WATER_MOON_STYLE.title: Water Moon Stance
TH_YOUMU-WATER_MOON_STYLE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Choose an [gold]Attack[/gold] card in your hand; give it [gold]Counter[/gold] and {IfUpgraded:show:|temporary} [gold]Retain[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-SHEATHING.title: Sheathing Technique
TH_YOUMU-SHEATHING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
The next [gold]Attack[/gold] card you play deals triple damage.
TH_YOUMU-IAIDO.title: Iai Slash
TH_YOUMU-IAIDO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
If the previous card you played was a [gold]Skill[/gold] card, double this card's damage.
Gain 3 [gold]Stiffness[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-BINDING_SWORD.title: Binding Sign「Entangling Sword」
TH_YOUMU-FIVE_DECAY.title: Heavenly Sword「Five Decays of Deities」
TH_YOUMU-FIVE_DECAY.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
For each type of debuff on an enemy, double this card's damage once.
For the next {Cards:diff()} turns, [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Weak[/gold] on all enemies are twice as effective.
TH_YOUMU-RESTING.title: Resting on Arms
TH_YOUMU-RESTING.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_YOUMU-FEIGNED_SLEEP.title: Feigned Sleep
TH_YOUMU-FEIGNED_SLEEP.description: If any enemy does not intend to attack, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_DEFEND.title: Blade Parry
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_DEFEND.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] {Cards:diff()} times.
The [gold]Block[/gold] gained from this card is affected by [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-BLADE_SHARPENING.title: Blade Sharpening
TH_YOUMU-EVIL_GHOST.title: Evil Ghost
TH_YOUMU-TWO_PAIN_WHEEL.title: 「Twofold Wheel of Suffering」
TH_YOUMU-TWO_PAIN_WHEEL.description: Add [gold]Replay[/gold] 1 to all cards in your hand.
TH_YOUMU-BIZARRE_SIX_REALMS.title: Bizarre Six Realms
TH_YOUMU-BIZARRE_SIX_REALMS.description:
Whenever you play a card of a different type than the previous card, trigger an effect based on the previous card's type.
[gold]Attack[/gold]: Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold].
[gold]Skill[/gold]: Gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
[gold]Power[/gold]: Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_YOUMU-UNEXHAUSTED_SOUL.title: Unsevered Soul
TH_YOUMU-UNEXHAUSTED_SOUL.selectionScree: Choose a card to return to hand.
TH_YOUMU-CARD_SLASHER.title: Card Slasher
TH_YOUMU-CARD_SLASHER.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} extra, then choose 1 card to [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_SHARP.title: Half-Sword Sharp
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_SHARP.description: At the start of your turn, gain {Cards:diff()} [gold]Sword Gas[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_HEART.title: Half-Sword Heart
TH_YOUMU-HALF_SWORD_HEART.description: Your [gold]Sword Gas[/gold] is not removed at the end of your turn.
TH_YOUMU-SMART_HALF.title: Clever Half-Phantom
TH_YOUMU-SMART_HALF.description: Whenever you deal unblocked damage this turn, gain that much [gold]Block[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU.title: Half-Human Half-Phantom Gardener
TH_YOUMU-YOUMU.description: Whenever you [gold]Derive[/gold], gain {Energy:energyIcons()} equal to the cost of the [gold]Derived[/gold] card.
TH_YOUMU-WHEEL_SLASH.title: Heavenly Dharma Wheel Slash
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE.title: Meditation Slash「Roukanken Gives Me the Heart's Eye」
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card, [gold]Attack Derive[/gold] 1.
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_SWORD.title: Ghost Sword「Child-Yaksha Fast」
TH_YOUMU-GHOST_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Shuffle a [gold]Blight[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HUNGER_GHOST_SWORD.title: Hunger Sword「Preta Realm Scroll」
TH_YOUMU-HUNGER_GHOST_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card; [gold]Derive[/gold] {Cards:diff()} of the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card's type.
If the [gold]Exhausted[/gold] card is a [purple]Curse[/purple] or [red]Status[/red] card, instead [gold]Derive[/gold] {Cards:diff()} of any type.
TH_YOUMU-HUNGER_KING_SWORD.title: Hunger King Sword「Preta King's Retribution」
TH_YOUMU-HUNGER_KING_SWORD.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [purple]Curses[/purple] and [red]Status[/red] cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]; for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold], deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies.
Whenever a [purple]Curse[/purple] or [red]Status[/red] card enters your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], return this card to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-HELL_FIRE_SWORD.title: Hellfire Sword「Karma Wind Flash Shadow Array」
TH_YOUMU-HELL_FIRE_SWORD.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies X{IfUpgraded:show:+2|} times, then add X [gold]Burn[/gold] to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-HELL_GOD_SWORD.title: Hell God Sword「Karma Wind God Flash Slash」
TH_YOUMU-HELL_GOD_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies once.
For each [gold]Sword Gas[/gold], deal an additional instance of damage.
Gain 2 [gold]Stiffness[/gold]; this card's [gold]Stiffness[/gold] counts as [purple]Spell Card Level[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-BEYOND_SWORD.title: Other Shore Sword「Hell and Paradise Random Slash」
TH_YOUMU-A_THOUGHT_COUNTLESS_KALPAS.titl: Six Paths Sword「One Thought, Countless Kalpas」
TH_YOUMU-A_THOUGHT_COUNTLESS_KALPAS.desc: Playing cards this turn no longer costs {Energy:energyIcons()}; instead, gain that much [gold]Decay[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-HELL_FLASH.title: Light Sign「Flash of the Underworld」
TH_YOUMU-HELL_FLASH.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
If you have a [purple]Curse[/purple] or [red]Status[/red] card in your hand, double this card's effects.
TH_YOUMU-STILL_WATER.title: Still Water Mirror
TH_YOUMU-STILL_WATER.description: For each [gold]Combo[/gold] stack, increase damage dealt by {Cards:diff()}0%.
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_BLOW_SNOW.title: Sakura Sign「Saigyou Blizzard」
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA_BLOW_SNOW.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Put a [gold]Sakura{IfUpgraded:show:+|}[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], and [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] respectively.
TH_YOUMU-SAKURA.title: Sakura
TH_YOUMU-FLOWER_SEA_CAT.title: Secret Art「Saigyou Spring Breeze Slash」
TH_YOUMU-FLOWER_SEA_CAT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies twice.
Double this card's damage once for each [gold]Sakura[/gold] you have (wherever they are).
TH_YOUMU-DEATH_HALF.title: Death-Wish Half-Phantom
TH_YOUMU-DEATH_HALF.description: Whenever an enemy takes damage originating from you, gain that much [gold]Demise[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-AWAKE_HALF.title: Binding Sign「Half-Phantom Enlightenment」
TH_YOUMU-HELL_PUNISHMENT.title: Animal Path Sword「Ineffective Punishment」
TH_YOUMU-HELL_PUNISHMENT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage {Cards:diff()} times.
Deal an additional {Cards:diff()} damage for each debuff stack on the enemy.
TH_YOUMU-LIFE_DEATH_HALF_HALF.title: Half & Half of Life and Death
TH_YOUMU-LIFE_DEATH_HALF_HALF.descriptio:
When your HP is above 50%, double damage dealt, but lose 6 HP each time you play an [gold]Attack[/gold] card.
When your HP is below 50%, halve damage taken, and heal 6 HP each time you play a [gold]Skill[/gold] card.
TH_YOUMU-DUAL_HEAVEN_STYLE.title: Niten Ichi-ryu
TH_YOUMU-DUAL_HEAVEN_STYLE.description:
Your [gold]Attack[/gold] cards deal 25% less damage, but are played an additional time.
If you have [gold]The Book of Five Rings[/gold], damage is not reduced.
TH_YOUMU-WIND_WOOD_FIRE_MOUNTAIN.title: Wind, Wood, Fire, Mountain
TH_YOUMU-WIND_WOOD_FIRE_MOUNTAIN.descrip:
At the start of your turn, cycle through and gain the following effects:
Draw 1 extra card.
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold].
Gain 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
TH_YOUMU-PEACE_SWORD.title: Star Sword「Like Nirvana」
TH_YOUMU-PEACE_SWORD.description:
Apply 1 [gold]Slow[/gold] to all enemies.
Remove all debuffs from yourself.
[purple]Spell Card Level Cancel[/purple].
TH_YOUMU-INDIFFERENT_SENTIENT_BEINGS.tit: Four Paths Sword「Silent Voices of All Beings」
TH_YOUMU-INDIFFERENT_SENTIENT_BEINGS.des: For each living player, [gold]Derive[/gold] 1 of any type.
TH_YOUMU-CUT_SOUL_SWORD.title: Spirit-Cutting Sword「Buddhahood Slash」
TH_YOUMU-CUT_SOUL_SWORD.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a player.
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [purple]Curses[/purple] and [red]Status[/red] cards of that player; for each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold], both you and that player draw 1 card and increase the damage dealt by 1.
Remove all debuffs from that player; for each type removed, both you and that player gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and double the damage dealt once.
TH_YOUMU-DIRECT.title: Overflowing Spring
TH_YOUMU-SEVEN_SOULS_TABOOS.title: Heavenly Sword「Seven Souls Taboo」
TH_YOUMU-SEVEN_SOULS_TABOOS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
For each type of debuff on the enemy, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s).
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE_LOST_SLASH.title: 「Mind's Eye Lost Slash」
TH_YOUMU-HEART_EYE_LOST_SLASH.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
[gold]Attack Derive[/gold] 1.
When [gold]Derived[/gold], choose a random card in your hand; it can be played for free this turn.
TH_YOUMU-REFLECTION_SLASH.title: 「Reflection Satellite Slash」
TH_YOUMU-REFLECTION_SLASH.description:
Deal damage to each enemy equal to its attack intent value multiplied by {Cards:diff()}.
This card returns to your hand after being played.
TH_YOUMU-INTENT_SEEN.title: Intent Insight
TH_YOUMU-INTENT_SEEN.description:
If the enemy intends to attack, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] and gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Otherwise, apply {Cards:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_HEART.title: Sword Heart Unhindered
TH_YOUMU-SWORD_HEART.description:
At the start of your turn:
If any enemy intends to block, gain 2 [gold]Strength[/gold] for each such enemy.
If any enemy intends to attack, gain 2 [gold]Dexterity[/gold] for each such enemy.
If any enemy intends to do something else, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and draw {Cards:diff()} card(s) for each such enemy.
TH_YOUMU-THREE_SOUL.title: Heavenly God Sword「Three Souls Seven Spirits」
TH_YOUMU-THREE_SOUL.description: Choose up to 3 cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] and return them to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-THREE_SOUL.selectionScreenPromp: Choose cards to return to your hand.
TH_YOUMU-LIGHTING_WHIRLWIND_SLASH.title: Lightning Whirlwind Slash
TH_YOUMU-LIGHTING_WHIRLWIND_SLASH.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to all enemies X times.
If X is greater than 3, [gold]Stun[/gold] all enemies.
TH_YOUMU-MANBA_OUT.title: Manba Elbow
TH_YOUMU-FASTEST.title: Fastest on Earth
TH_YOUMU-FASTEST.description: At the start of your turn, draw {Cards:diff()} additional card(s).
